title: stelis vespertina
intro: Stelis vespertina, also known as the Evening Stelis, is a rare and endangered orchid species native to the tropical forests of Central America and Mexico. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antispasmodic, antitussive, and expectorant effects, which make it useful in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Stelis vespertina include its ability to soothe coughs, reduce inflammation, and promote relaxation. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing individuals to harness its medicinal properties in a safe and natural way.
